use_when: Create or update INDEX.csv, INDEX.md, or an index table inside an existing Markdown asset
excludes: General Markdown editing, routing architecture design without index changes, or review-only index validation

use_when: Create one new agent skill or scaffold a new skill package
excludes: Target skill already exists, or the request is evaluation, naming, compression, or routing migration

use_when: Edit or improve one existing agent skill and its resources
excludes: Creating a new skill, review-only evaluation, naming-only, compression-only, or consolidating multiple skills

use_when: Evaluate or review one existing agent skill's effectiveness without modifying it
excludes: Field or structural validation, requested fixes, creation, naming-only, or compression-only work

use_when: Validate one existing skill's required fields and basic file or route structure
excludes: Quality evaluation, requested fixes, creation, naming-only, or compression-only work

use_when: Suggest, validate, or apply an agent asset name when naming is the primary task
excludes: Content or structure changes where naming is incidental

use_when: Optimize one or more agent assets (e.g. compress, structure, formatting) for model efficiency
excludes: Broad directory optimization without clear targets, or review-only checks

use_when: Consolidate multiple related existing skills into one routing skill or migrate a routing skill structure
excludes: Creating one new regular skill, renaming assets, or unrelated skill edits

use_when: Evaluate whether a workflow or asset can and should be scriptified
excludes: Generating the script or modifying the original asset directly

use_when: Create an implementation plan for scriptifying a workflow
excludes: Writing the actual code or evaluating feasibility from scratch
Planning, evaluation, or arbitrary script generation without a plan
